description: Exact database lookup first. When no exact type-size-rating record is available, use logarithmic interpolation between adjacent sizes within the first available standard series. Extrapolation is not allowed.

calculationLogic.step1: Normalize flange type, size and rating.
calculationLogic.step4: Otherwise select the first standard series available according to standardPriority and apply logarithmic interpolation.

usage: Budgetary estimation based on the uploaded flange database
importantLimitation: Flange type, size and rating do not always define a unique weight. Different standards can contain different weights for the same three inputs. The exactWeights table applies the embedded standard-priority rule, while alternativeWeights preserves other source values.
